_comment: Minimal offline advisory dataset for the dependency scanner. Real deployments sync this from OSV/GitHub Advisory data via a plugin; this seed set makes the scanner useful out of the box and gives tests deterministic input. Version ranges use simple comparison semantics handled by the scanner.

advisories.title: Flask session cookie disclosure via caching proxies
advisories.summary: Responses may be cached and served to other users when a proxy caches Set-Cookie under certain configurations, leaking session cookies.

advisories.title: Requests leaks Proxy-Authorization header on redirect
advisories.summary: The Proxy-Authorization header is forwarded to the destination server on cross-origin redirects, exposing proxy credentials.

advisories.title: PyYAML arbitrary code execution via full_load
advisories.summary: Untrusted YAML processed with the default loader can execute arbitrary code.

advisories.title: Lodash command injection via template
advisories.summary: Prototype pollution / command injection through the template function in versions before 4.17.21.

advisories.title: Axios SSRF / credential leak via redirects
advisories.summary: Axios could leak confidential data through cross-site request forgery when following redirects before 1.6.0.

advisories.title: Minimist prototype pollution
advisories.summary: Prototype pollution allowing modification of Object.prototype before 1.2.6.
